phoneticUs: 藞de瑟li蓹藢藞d蓱藧li蓹藢藞d忙li蓹
examples: They demonstrated that "Dahlia pinnata" should more properly be designated "D.x pinata".
"No," said Dahlia; "it was one of Tholomyes' ideas."
Don't ask me what. I'm not quite at the growing-dahlia stage.
Dahlia you live in Virginia, give us some background on this man - would you please?
Ms. DAHLIA CLARK: I want to go back to Texas because it's more funner down there.
